The '''''Republic''-class cruiser''' was a medium-sized combat vessel introduced during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion.

==History==
Cheap and easy to produce, they were manufactured in large numbers during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. ''Republic''-class vessels were seen at the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]], and at the fleet assembled around [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] near the end of the war. Two ''Republic''-class cruisers were used in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s [[Maw Irregular Fleet]].
